playbook.intent: 2-3 person agency to sellable to strategic / acqui-hire / manager-operator within 6-12 months; same prep removes founder dependency even if not selling.
playbook.scope: Get a 2-3 person agency to a state where it is sellable to a strategic buyer, an acqui-hirer, or transferable to a manager-operator within 6-12 months. Even if not selling, the same prep removes founder dependency. Exit artifact: due-diligence-ready data room + valuation rubric scorecard + handover SOP kit.

success-criteria.criterion: Data room with financial, legal, commercial assets

stage.name: Founder-dependency audit
stage.intent: Where the agency falls apart without the founder.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once founder-only decisions are tagged with a plan to delegate.

stage.name: Financial + legal pack
stage.decision-gate: Advance once a stranger could read the packs and forecast next 12 months.

stage.name: Valuation + buyer fit
stage.intent: Run valuation rubric; identify buyer archetypes.
stage.decision-gate: Advance with at least one buyer archetype showing live interest signal.

stage.name: Handover kit
stage.intent: Manager-operator can run agency end-to-end from kit.
stage.decision-gate: Required: an outsider can read the kit and run the agency for 30 days.

extra.value: [Investment banker representation - out of scope for micro-agency, Public-market transactions - irrelevant to this size]
[Steady revenue across 18+ months, Bookkeeping + paperwork in functional state]
[Selling before deciding - buyers smell desperation, Skipping the dependency audit - sale collapses in due diligence, Treating handover kit as optional - it is the asset]
['Could a manager-operator run this for 30 days using only the kit?', 'Are the financials clean enough for due diligence?', 'Did I price honestly, not aspirationally?']

{human: faion get-content prep-the-agency-for-acquisition --format md, agent: faion get-content prep-the-agency-for-acquisition --format context, json: faion get-content prep-the-agency-for-acquisition --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
